product_name: Anime Heroes - One Piece - Brook, 6.5" Action Figure

bullets: Set Sail with your favorite pirates - Brook, also known as "Soul King" is one of the two swordsmen of the Straw Hat Pirates and the crew musician. He ate the Yomi Yomi no Mi devil fruit which gave him the power to return to life after his death, and he now has devloped powers to control the souls of others, and himself. Brook was originally part of the Rumbar Pirates but died, and since his soul took so long to return he came back as a skeleton with his iconic afro
Manga Inspired packaging – Each Anime Heroes line has manga inspired packaging and beautiful artwork on the front featuring the characters you know and love
Endless Play - Each figure come with 2 sets of interchangeable hands, character specific accessories, and 16+ points of articulation to pose and play in endless ways
Collect them all - Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles America has a full line-up of One Piece action figures for you to show off your fandom and collect your favorite characters
Impressive Likeness - Each figure comes with detailed sculpt and true to show features that Anime Heroes action figures are known for. For ages 4 and up
content.description: Set Sail with your favorite pirates - Sabo, brother of Ace and Luffy, and the Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army! He is recognized as the No. 2 of the entire organization, being directly after Dragon himself in terms of command. He ate the Mera-Mera no Mi (the devil fruit originally belong to Ace), Sabo is capable of shooting out powerful pyrokinetic blasts and explosions. The figure comes with 2 sets of interchangeable hands, character specific accessories, and 20+ points of articulation to pose and play in endless ways! For ages 4 and up.

attributes.whats_in_box: figure, 2 sets of interchangable hands, character specific accessories

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
